title: Pyatnadtsatiletniy kapitan
writer: Jules Verne, Georgiy Grebner, Vasily Zhuravlyov
actors: Vsevolod Larionov, Aleksandr Khvylya, Mikhail Astangov
plot: This is an adaptation of Jules Verne's novel Dick Sand, A Captain at Fifteen. The fifteen-year-old sailor Dick Sand have to take command of the ship.
